Visit link below: https://ipg.aptdetails.com/rntwuw Enjoy Luxury Living at Silver Lake at Silver Bay Apartments! 2 bedroom | 2 bath | 956 square feet Features ✓  Cable ready ✓  Stove ✓  Lake views ✓  Granite counter top and other renovations available ✓  Washer/Dryer ✓  Gas Fireplace ✓  Courtyard views ✓  Private patio/balcony ✓  Ceiling fan ✓  Large windows with lots of light ✓  Garbage disposal ✓  Dishwasher ✓  Microwave ✓  Centralized air conditioning and heat ✓  Vaulted ceilings ✓  Refrigerator Community Features ✓  24 hour emergency maintenance ✓  Private resident lounge ✓  Picnic areas ✓  Greenbelt access ✓  Shimmering swimming pool ✓  Year round invigorating spa ✓  Pet stations ✓  Reserved covered parking available ✓  Community events every month ✓  Private lake access with walking path ✓  Online maintenance request option ✓  Lake and foothill views ✓  Online payment option ✓  On site management open 7 days a week ✓  24 Hour Fitness Studio ✓  Outdoor gas grills ✓  Easy access to pubic transportation Community Info If you've always wanted to live on the water, Silver Bay Apartments in Boise, Idaho is for you! Enjoy boating, fishing, sailing, swimming, or just "lazing" along the water's edge in a secluded quiet community on the largest lake in Boise. Easy access to freeways, parks, golf courses, and the Boise River/Greenbelt create even more recreational opportunities. Most of our one- and two-bedroom apartment homes boast brand new flooring, carpet, and vaulted ceilings. Renovated apartment homes are available. Our community features a shimmering pool, oversized year-round invigorating spa, fitness studio and resident lounge big enough to host private parties. Residents enjoy the use of the grills on the pool deck. We are close to downtown Boise where you will find fine dining, shopping and entertainment at your fingertips. St. Lukes Boise Medical Center, Idaho Power, Idaho Banking, Syringa Bank and Micron Technology are just a few of the employers located in the Boise area. Best of all, Silver Bay is a pet-friendly community in Boise, Idaho and provides you and your best friend with a place to relax together. Share in the fun, yet enjoy the privacy and quiet you desire. Come visit us today! Pet Policy Silver Bay Apartments is a pet friendly community and welcomes up to 2 pets per home. For each animal there is a $150 non-refundable fee, $300 additional security deposit per pet and $25 pet rent monthly per pet. You animal will enjoy long walks on the Greenbelt, to local parks and jumping into the beautiful Silver Lake on a hot day! We also love visits from our furry friends in the Leasing office as often as possible! Income Requirements 2.5 gross monthly income Office Hours Monday-Saturday: 8:00AM-5:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity nUY8ty8B9r
